base_prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Keep the silhouette clean, premium, and readable in battle. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no giant beam, no long travel trail, no fog wall, no elemental fireball

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject a compact pre-hit charge knot with a slight forward pull, as if dragon energy is coiling before impact. Keep the silhouette tight, premium, and easy to composite over a battle scene. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
assets.notes: Small ignition element for charge timing.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject a compact hit bloom at the moment of contact, with a dense cobalt-violet center, ember-gold edge pulse, and sharp scale fragments radiating outward. Keep it readable at small size and battle-ready. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject a short directional slash made of fractured scales and a hot core, not a long travel beam. Keep the motion clear, compact, and battle-ready. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
assets.notes: Short directional support slash; not a travel segment.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject lingering dragon residue: low-alpha smoke, faint ember motes, and broken scale fragments after the hit. Keep it subtle enough to layer behind the bloom without obscuring it. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
